creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hej, we started a *BSD UG in Düsseldorf, Germany. We currently meet bi-monthly on the second tuesday in even months. I created some HTML to include on the User Groups page:
BSD NRW

BSD.NRW is located in Düsseldorf, NRW, Germany for all people interested in the *BSDs in the Rhein-Ruhr area. We currently meet every two months on the second tuesday of the month, upcoming dates and more info on the BSD.NRW website.
